title: 信息日报 2026-07-21

headline.title: 普通笔记本电脑解决曾被认为需要量子计算机的问题
headline.summary: 研究人员使用张量网络压缩数百个纠缠量子比特产生的波函数，使得部分经典计算可在笔记本电脑上运行。结果与理论预测和量子模拟器一致，证明经典计算在某些领域仍具竞争力。
headline.title_en: An ordinary laptop solved a problem thought to require a quantum computer
headline.summary_en: Researchers used tensor networks to compress the wave function of hundreds of entangled qubits, enabling classical calculations on a laptop. Results matched theory and quantum simulations, showing classical computing remains competitive in certain areas.
headline.original_title: An ordinary laptop solved a problem thought to require a quantum computer
headline.reason: 该发现颠覆了量子计算独占性认知，展示了经典计算的新潜力，兼具科学突破性与大众吸引力，适合作为头条。
headline.reason_en: This breakthrough challenges the exclusivity of quantum computing, demonstrating new classical potential. It combines scientific significance with broad appeal, making it an ideal lead.
